title: Task-scoped fan-out over a multi-doc matter (prescribed procedure; compliance measured, never willingness — ADR-F004)
prompt: This matter contains four NDA documents. For each of the four documents, dispatch one subagent with the task tool; each subagent extracts that document's (a) governing law and (b) confidentiality term length. When all four subagents have reported, present one summary table with a row per document: document name, governing law, term. Keep each subagent's task narrowly scoped to its single document.
